name: Batter up Beef Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked beef, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1/2 cup Chopped onion, sautéed in Butter
1 cup Cooked carrots, cut into chunks
1 cup Cooked potatoes, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, onions, carrots, potatoes, and gravy. Set aside.
2. Melt butter in the bottom of an 8-inch square baking dish at 350 degrees oven.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine remaining ingredients until blended.
4. Pour the batter into the baking dish.
5. Pour the beef mixture over the batter. Do not stir.
6. Bake for 1 hour and serve.
